_publications._publicationTitle: Brain-wide structural and functional disruption in mice with oligodendrocyte-specific

_contextSnippet: We scanned controls and Plp-Nf1 fl/+ mice using DTI...we acclimated 18 animals for awake head-fixed rs-fMRI
details: Successfully detected brain-wide structural and functional differences in Plp-Nf1 fl/+ mice using both DTI and rs-fMRI protocols
